caption: The video features an elderly man standing at a podium, addressing an audience in what appears to be a formal or semi-formal event. He is wearing glasses and a light blue shirt with a patterned design, along with a necklace. The setting includes wooden blinds in the background and a microphone on the podium, indicating that he is giving a speech or presentation. The audience, seated in front of him, is attentively listening. The man seems to be holding some papers or notes, possibly referring to them as he speaks. The atmosphere suggests a community gathering or educational event, with the focus on the speaker's message. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the corner, which might indicate the organization or theme of the event.
